untranslatable_reason: Body momentum indicator is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The signal requires a custom calculation: Body_momentum = B_up / (B_up + B_down) where B_up = sum of days with (close - open) > 0 and B_down = sum of days with (close - open) < 0 over a 14-day lookback. This requires tracking cumulative counts of up/down body days, which is not available as a pre-computed indicator. The 'body' indicator exists but only provides current bar body, not the momentum ratio calculation needed.
translation_notes: The signal requires custom calculation of body momentum over a 14-period lookback window. While individual bar 'body' values are available, the normalized momentum ratio (B_up divided by sum of absolute body values) must be computed by the backtest engine. Entry conditions are directional (long when > 70, short when < 20). Exit conditions use midpoint (50) as reversal signal since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified.
